question: What is the return policy?
answer: You can return products within 30 days if they are unused and in original condition.

question: How long does delivery take?
answer: Delivery takes 3-7 business days.

question: Do you ship internationally?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 40+ countries.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept UPI, credit card, debit card, PayPal, and COD.

question: How can I track my order?
answer: You will receive a tracking link after your product is shipped.

question: Do you offer COD (Cash on Delivery)?
answer: Yes, we offer Cash on Delivery for selected locations.

question: Can I cancel my order?
answer: Yes, you can cancel your order before it is shipped. Once shipped, cancellation is not possible.

question: What if I receive a damaged product?
answer: If you receive a damaged or defective product, raise a return request within 48 hours for a free replacement or refund.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can contact our support team via email or live chat 24/7.

question: Do I need an account to place an order?
answer: You can place an order as a guest, but creating an account allows faster checkout and order tracking.

question: What happens if I miss my delivery?
answer: Our delivery partner will attempt delivery two more times or contact you to reschedule.

question: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
answer: Address changes are possible only before the order is shipped.

question: Do you offer discounts or coupons?
answer: Yes, we frequently offer promo codes and seasonal discounts. Subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated.

question: Are product prices inclusive of taxes?
answer: Yes, all prices shown include taxes unless stated otherwise.

question: What is your refund process?
answer: Refunds are initiated within 2–5 business days after successful return pickup.

question: How long does refund take?
answer: Refunds can take 2–7 business days to appear in your bank depending on your payment method.

question: Do you offer warranty on products?
answer: Yes, many products include manufacturer warranty. Warranty details are mentioned on product pages.

question: What should I do if I entered wrong shipping details?
answer: Contact support immediately so we can attempt correction before dispatch.

question: Why is my order delayed?
answer: Delays may occur due to high demand or logistics issues. You will be informed via SMS/email if this happens.

question: Can I return a product bought on sale?
answer: Yes, sale items can be returned unless marked “non-returnable.”

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is available on both Android and iOS platforms.

question: How do I apply a promo code?
answer: You can enter the promo code during checkout in the designated field.

question: What happens if I receive the wrong item?
answer: Contact customer support immediately. We will arrange return pickup and send you the correct item at no extra cost.

question: I received wrong product what to do?
answer: Contact our support team at support@ecommerce.com or call 1800-123-4567. We will arrange free pickup and send the correct product immediately.
